name: Mr David Obi
title: Consultant Orthopaedic Surgeon
bio: Mr Obi is a consultant orthopaedic surgeon with particular expertise in hip and knee replacement surgery. He trained at the Royal College of Surgeons and has performed over 2,000 joint replacements.

name: Dr Rachel Torres
title: Consultant Cardiologist
bio: Dr Torres is a consultant cardiologist specialising in interventional cardiology and heart failure management. She leads the hospital's rapid access chest pain clinic.
bullets: MBBS FRCP MD Cardiology|Interventional cardiology specialist|BHF-funded researcher

name: Mr James Adeyemi
title: Consultant General Surgeon
bio: Mr Adeyemi is a laparoscopic general surgeon with expertise in abdominal and colorectal surgery. He is passionate about patient education and minimally invasive techniques.
bullets: FRCS General Surgery|Laparoscopic specialist|MSc in Medical Education

name: Alison Wright
title: Lead Consultant Midwife
bio: Alison is the hospital's lead consultant midwife with 20 years of experience. She oversees the maternity unit and specialises in high-risk pregnancies and maternal wellbeing.
bullets: RM RN MSc (Midwifery)|High-risk pregnancy specialist|UNICEF Baby Friendly accreditation lead
